text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, if it isn't Cafe! Happy birthday to you. Your
present's on top of your desk, so be sure to take
a look.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not an expert on coffee by any means, so I
opted to give you a mug instead. Feel free to use
it if it strikes your fancy.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What did you rig the mug with this time?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! The way you immediately look for a
catch just how well you know me!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I know... that a present from you... is never... just
a present.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Except for this mug! After all, today is your
birthday, a time for celebration!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Here, why don't you give it a try? It's just a mug. I
have no ulterior motive at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That said, I am curious to see if your doubt of me
affects your mind enough to cause your hands to
shake while pouring coffee.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to observe your actions with the utmost
attention to detail. That is all I ask!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Sounds like plenty of ulterior motive to me.
